name: Users-roles join (1 case, 2026-06-05)
description: The AspNet identity many-to-many join the copilot abstained on (trace 561) — proves the value-linker no longer self-poisons on CopilotChatSessions.Title.

Scenarios.Question: list of user and there roles
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON u.Id=ur.UserId JOIN AspNetRoles r ON ur.RoleId=r.Id
